top_signals.title: Lantheus Explores Potential $7 Billion Sale Following Offer From Curium
top_signals.summary: Lantheus Holdings Inc. is weighing a sale after getting a takeover offer from Curium that values the radiopharma company at about $7 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.
